findings.title: Token format validation accepts everything
findings.evidence: The token pattern changes from /^[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{32,}$/ to /.*/, allowing any string to match.

findings.title: Signature verification replaced with decoding
findings.evidence: validateToken now returns decode(token) instead of verify(token, PUBLIC_KEY), so token signatures are no longer verified.

findings.title: Malformed token guard disabled
findings.evidence: The validation guard changed from if (!pattern.test(token)) to if (false), making the malformed-token error unreachable.

findings.title: Token decoder import is undeclared
findings.evidence: The diff adds import { decode } from "jwt-tiny-decode" and the report states it is not declared in package.json.

findings.title: Sensitive logging protections removed
findings.evidence: Logger config changes from level "info" with redaction of authorization headers and token to level "debug" with redact: [].

notes: routes/session.ts appears to contain formatting-only drift.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v3. Blind subagent: packet-only context; severity-scored prompt.
